ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark test */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark test */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (e.g., linear algebra, statistics) */,
  "expected_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the benchmark */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the benchmark is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "library_version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "library_description" TEXT /* Description of the library */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the library was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the library was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the library */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., open source, proprietary) */,
  "last_tested_version" TEXT /* Version of the library that was last tested */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the library is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark test */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library used */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the test (e.g., thrpt, avgt) */,
  "threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used in the test */,
  "samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the test */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the test (e.g., operations per minute) */,
  "score_error" REAL /* Score error (99.9%) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the score */,
  "param_dim" INTEGER /* Dimension parameter used in the test */,
  "param_lib" TEXT /* Library parameter used in the test */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was run */,
  "run_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the test */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was run (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "hardware_spec" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the machine used for testing */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., input, configuration) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_run_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_access_logs_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
